name: aiomysensors

metadata.name: aiomysensors
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python asyncio package to connect to MySensors gateways.

documentation:
# aiomysensors

--- **Source Code**: https://github.com/MartinHjelmare/aiomysensors --- Python asyncio package to connect to MySensors gateways. ## Installation Install this via pip (or your favourite package manager): `pip install aiomysensors` ## Example ```py """Show a minimal example using aiomysensors.""" import asyncio from aiomysensors import AIOMySensorsError, Gateway, SerialTransport async def run_gateway() -> None: """Run a serial gateway.""" port = "/dev/ttyACM0" baud = 115200 transport = SerialTransport(port, baud) try: async with Gateway(transport) as gateway: async for message in gateway.listen(): print("Message received:", message) except AIOMySensorsError as err: print("Error:", err) if __name__ == "__main__": try: asyncio.run(run_gateway()) except KeyboardInterrupt: pass ``` ## Command Line Interface There's a CLI for testing purposes. ```sh aiomysensors --debug serial-gateway -p /dev/ttyACM0 ``` ## Credits This package was created with [Copier](https://copier.readthedocs.io/) and the [browniebroke/pypackage-template](https://github.com/browniebroke/pypackage-template) project template.

classes.name: aiomysensors.exceptions.AIOMySensorsError
documentation: Represent a base exception for aiomysensors.

classes.name: aiomysensors.exceptions.TooManyNodesError
documentation: Represent too many nodes in the network.

params.name: typer.Option("--host", "-H", help="Host of the MQTT broker.")
typer.Option("--port", "-p", help="Port of the MQTT broker.")

typer.Option(
            "--in-prefix",
            "-i",
            help="Topic in-prefix to subscribe to at the broker.",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--out-prefix",
            "-o",
            help="Topic out-prefix to publish to at the broker.",
        )
typer.Option("--port", "-p", help="Serial port of the gateway.")
typer.Option("--baud", "-b", help="Baud rate of the serial connection.")
typer.Option("--host", "-H", help="Host of the TCP connection.")
typer.Option("--port", "-p", help="Port of the TCP connection.")

modules.name: aiomysensors.model.message
documentation:
Provide a MySensors message abstraction.

Validation should be done on a protocol level, i.e. not with gateway state.

documentation: Represent a message from the gateway.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.Transport.write
documentation: Write a decoded message to the transport.

Represent a MySensors transport.

Method callers should handle TransportError.

documentation: Write a decoded message to the transport.

documentation: Start the scheduled saving of data.

classes.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.ReceivedMessage
documentation: Represent a received message from the broker.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport.write
documentation: Write a decoded message to the transport.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._connect
documentation:
Connect the transport.

Raise TransportError if the connection failed.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._publish
documentation:
Publish to topic.

Raise TransportError if the publish failed.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._subscribe
documentation:
Subscribe to topic.

Raise TransportError if the subscribe failed.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._receive
documentation:
Receive an MQTT message.

Call this method when a message is received from the MQTT broker.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._receive_error
documentation:
Propagate an Exception raised when receiving an MQTT message.

Call this method when receiving a message failed.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._parse_mqtt_to_message
documentation:
Parse an MQTT topic and payload.

Return a decoded message.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTTransport._parse_message_to_mqtt
documentation:
Parse a decoded message.

Return an MQTT topic, payload and qos-level as a tuple.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTClient._connect
documentation:
Connect to the broker.

Raise TransportError if the connection failed.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTClient._publish
documentation:
Publish to topic.

Raise TransportError if the publish failed.

methods.name: aiomysensors.transport.mqtt.MQTTClient._subscribe
